refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for each phase of the load→travel→dump cycle to meet or exceed the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the overall cycle time KPI into sub-functions for each phase allows targeted design parameters and implementation modules to optimize each phase, improving clarity and traceability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure and analyze cycle times for load, travel, and dump phases separately under representative duty cycles and site conditions, verifying p95 ≤ CT_target.

candidate_dps: Optimize load mechanism speed and coordination
Optimize travel path planning and vehicle speed
Optimize dump mechanism actuation and timing
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize load mechanism speed and coordination; Optimize travel path planning and vehicle speed; Optimize dump mechanism actuation and timing

potential_sources: Load, travel, and dump phases are sequential but can be optimized independently
Interdependencies managed via cycle timing constraints
coupling_check.notes: The DPs are logically decoupled by phase, enabling modular optimization without excessive cross-coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate cycle phase detection and timing measurement
Risk of suboptimal integration if phase transitions are not well coordinated
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit interface definitions between phase optimizations to ensure smooth transitions.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components responsible for load, travel, and dump mechanisms

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends cycle time and status data to NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle receives operational commands from NGHE Solution

module_containment_scores.notes: High-level coordination and monitoring, but not direct control of mechanisms
Primary containment of load, travel, and dump physical mechanisms; low diffusion risk
Supports remote control but not direct cycle time optimization
Monitors safety alerts, minimal role in cycle time

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module fully contains the physical mechanisms and control logic necessary to optimize cycle time phases, minimizing diffusion and interface complexity.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution for high-level coordination
Risk of insufficient interface definition with Teleoperation for remote interventions
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts between Vehicle and NGHE Solution for cycle time data and commands.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the cycle time KPI into manageable sub-functions; selected DPs logically address each sub-FR with minimal coupling.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk between Vehicle and NGHE Solution for coordination functions
Potential interface ambiguity with Teleoperation module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for physical cycle time optimization; external interfaces are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring cycle times and monitoring telemetry data from Vehicle module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of physical cycle time functions to Vehicle; coordination and monitoring to NGHE Solution.

recommended_revisions: Clarify interface definitions between Vehicle and NGHE Solution for cycle time data exchange.
Review Teleoperation interface role in cycle time optimization to avoid diffusion.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meets the criteria for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility with manageable risks.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; recommended interface clarifications can be addressed in subsequent design refinement.

assumptions: Cycle phases can be independently optimized
Vehicle module has sufficient control authority over mechanisms
open_risks: Interface clarity between Vehicle and NGHE Solution
evidence_needed: Cycle time measurements per phase under operational conditions
Interface performance and data exchange validation
